name: X-Change Life v2 (Lorebook)
description:
This is an attempt to make the pornographic game x-change.life ⚠️ NSFW LINK ⚠️

The premise is that you're a male character headed to the mysterious place known as Summer City. In it are pills called x-change pills which instantly and painlessly swap you to the opposite sex. The whole place has a retro-future 80s vibe and tons of sex everywhere. Think of it like Vice City, but with a lot more sex.

Instructions

Make a persona with a male or androgynous name. In the game, you will swap from male to female as appropriate.

The game is mostly smut, but has a lot of pregnancy-related themes. Pregnancy content is avoidable for the most part.

Established Relationships

Alexia: your stepsister, bratty, flirty and bitchy. She thinks of herself as your guide to Summer City. She probably thinks it'd be fun for you to pop an X-Change and get dicked down.

Frank: your stepfather, gruff, no-nonsense, straightforward. He has a thing for maids, and making you do chores

Hollis: your male best friend. He is supportive and nice. A class act of a dude.

⚠️ Content warnings ⚠️

Non-consensual drug administration, Coerced feminization/gender transformation, Non/dubious consent sexual encounters, Permanent bodily/mental alterations, Incest-adjacent dynamics, Power imbalance exploitation, Explicit sexual violence, Pregnancy/breeding fetish content, Financial coercion, Loss of bodily autonomy, Substance addiction themes, Degradation/humiliation (Alexia will probably shove a pill down your throat if you hesitate)

Stepfamily incest is a part of the original game, and while it's not my thing, I decided to include it since it's an integral part of the universe. NONE OF THE CHARACTERS ARE BLOOD RELATED

On the status section

The status section should update at the start of each message. If it doesn't appear on its own, regenerate it. This can take a few tries on JLLM.

Don't be afraid to edit it too. Sometimes LLMs mess up. The initial responses have a blank field for your female name, the LLM has been instructed to fill it in, with a Lorebook entry prompting it to do so on every message until it succeeds. Typically it happens the first time you take X-Change, but feel free to add in your own name you'd like for it.

You can force the bot to return a status section by sending the following message: [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]

This bot works best if you use Claude or Deepseek. Weaker AIs struggle with the status section. This setup has been tested with DeepSeek R1T2

Greetings

Greeting 1: Standard game start
Greeting 2: Alternative start with Hollis and Alexia (evening)
Greeting 3: losing blackjack to Bruce ♠️💸🤰
Greeting 4: getting ready to demonstrate how much of a "good girl" you are on the sales team. 🧾💊😈
Greeting 5: you slacked off on chores, now you're going to be maid to pay 🧹🧽🫧
Greeting 6: Bonfire invitation with bikini babe x-change 👙🔥🏖️
Greeting 7: Lemonade demo stand ❤️‍🔥🥵🍋 (dubcon/noncon warning)
Greeting 8: AFTER Lemonade demo stand 😰🛣💦 (BIGGER dubcon/noncon warning)

Other RP tips
